summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of StoreAdmin Dashboard (Sistema de Gestao de Loja). All 14 features tested successfully - Dashboard, 12 module pages (Loja: Comissoes, Descontos, Metas de Venda; Cadastro: Gestao IMEI, Cartao, Grupo Permissao, Grupo de Contas, Fornecedor; Estoque: Movimentacao, NFe Fornecedor, Posicao Sintetica, Estoque Valorizado), and sidebar navigation. All pages render correctly with mock data via React Query.

dashboard.details: Dashboard renders with 4 stat cards (Vendas Hoje, Pedidos, Itens em Estoque, Vendedores Ativos), activity feed (Atividade Recente), and alerts section (Alertas)

navigation.details: All 13 navigation items work correctly (Dashboard + 12 module pages). Sidebar groups (Loja, Cadastro, Estoque) expand/collapse properly

loja_comissoes.details: Table renders 5 rows, search filter works (filtered to 1 row for 'Carlos'), create dialog opens with Formik validation (6 error messages shown on empty submit)

loja_descontos.details: Table renders 5 rows, search filter works (filtered to 1 row for 'Promo'), create/edit dialogs work with validation, edit form pre-fills correctly

loja_metas_venda.details: Table renders 6 rows with progress bars and status badges (Atingida, Em Andamento, Nao Atingida), search filter works

cadastro_gestao_imei.details: Table renders 6 rows, status filter works (filtered to 3 rows for 'Disponivel'), create dialog opens with IMEI validation

cadastro_cartao.details: Table renders 6 rows, create dialog works with form fields (bandeira, tipo, taxa, dias recebimento)

cadastro_grupo_permissao.details: Table renders 5 rows, create dialog works with permission checkboxes (6 permissions: loja, cadastro, estoque, financeiro, relatorios, configuracoes)

cadastro_grupo_contas.details: Table renders 5 rows, create dialog works with tipo select (receita/despesa), textarea for description

cadastro_fornecedor.details: Table renders 5 rows, create dialog works with CNPJ/email validation (6 error messages shown on invalid submit)

estoque_movimentacao.details: Table renders 6 rows, tipo filter works (filtered to 2 rows for 'Entrada'), create dialog works

estoque_nfe_fornecedor.details: Table renders 5 rows, detail view dialog shows correctly with NFe number, supplier, CNPJ, dates, items count, and total value

estoque_posicao_sintetica.details: Table renders 6 rows with progress bars and status badges (Normal, Baixo, Critico, Excesso), status filter works (filtered to 1 row for 'Critico')

estoque_estoque_valorizado.details: Table renders 6 rows with totals row (TOTAL), margin colors work (emerald for high >=50%, primary for medium 25-50%, amber for low <25%), search filter works

critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Formik + Yup validation is properly implemented across all forms
React Query is correctly used for mock data fetching
Shadcn UI components are consistently used throughout the app
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, selects) are clickable and functional
test_credentials: No authentication required - frontend-only app with mock data
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is mocked via React Query in /app/frontend/src/api/mockData.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 features tested and working. App is frontend-only with all data MOCKED via React Query. No backend API calls. All pages have data-testid attributes. Sidebar has 3 nav groups (Loja, Cadastro, Estoque) with expandable sub-items. App is in Portuguese (PT-BR).
mocked_api_note: ALL API CALLS ARE MOCKED - No real backend integration. All CRUD operations use Promise.resolve(mockData) pattern.
